title: TS Procure 812 - H&E stained section under glass coverslip on glass slide (TM - 013)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3f6v7","text":"The method is used to process H\u0026E stained slides through to Procure 812 resin blocks. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"d1klo","text":"Sample is not optimal for EM, best to dissect and use only the outer 2mm of tissue mass. Sample is usually derived from histology.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: SAN: SPEC No: OPERATOR & STEPS: OPERATOR & STEPS:
Remove coverslip by soaking in xylene Contributed by users minimum Overnight , check to see if coverslip has slide off, if not soak another Overnight .
2.5 % volume 25% Glutaraldehyde Contributed by users in 0.1 Molarity (M) Sorenson's Phosphate buffer (pH 7.2, 300mosmol/kg) for at least 00:05:00
0.1 Molarity (M) buffer 00:05:00
1 % volume Osmium Tetroxide ProSciTech in buffer 00:30:00
70 % volume Ethanol Contributed by users for at least 00:05:00 or overnight
95 % volume Ethanol Contributed by users 00:05:00
100 % volume Ethanol Contributed by users 00:05:00
100 % volume Ethanol Contributed by users dried with molecular sieve 00:05:00
50 % volume Ethanol Contributed by users 50 % volume Propylene oxide ProSciTech Catalog #C156 (CAS: 75-56-9) 00:10:00
100 % volume Propylene oxide ProSciTech Catalog #C156 (CAS: 75-56-9) 00:10:00
50 % volume Propylene oxide ProSciTech Catalog #C156 (CAS: 75-56-9) 50 % volume Procure 812 mix ProSciTech 00:20:00
100 % volume Procure 812 mix ProSciTech 00:20:00
100 % volume Procure 812 mix ProSciTech 01:00:00
Embed & polymerise overnight in oven at 60 °C
100 % volume Ethanol Contributed by users 00:05:00
95 % volume Ethanol Contributed by users 00:05:00
70 % volume Ethanol Contributed by users 00:05:00
Using diamond pen etch a circle on the back of the slide to indicate where the BEEM capsule should be placed during embedding.

Place slide into boiling water on hot plate setting 3 for 00:09:00 .Remove from water, gloves on, use tissues to hold slide down, angle single edged razor blade at 45o underneath tap washer to make a start to removal , then manually break BEEM capsule off slide.
